news.t: The Best, And Worst, Monthly Dividend ETFs
Best Oil and Gas ETFs for Q1 2021

holdings.infoBox: MLPA is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are Energy Transfer LP stock at 13.62%, Enterprise Products Partners at 12.33%, MPLX LP at 11.93%, Plains All American Pipeline at 10.81%, and Western Midstream Partners at 10.38%.

overview.description: The Global X MLP ETF (MLPA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive MLP Infrastructure index, a market-cap-weighted index of US-listed midstream MLPs, and is structured as a C-corporation. MLPA was launched on Apr 18, 2012 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Best Oil and Gas ETFs for Q1 2021
